word: H6203 - עֹרֶף - ʻôreph - o-ref' - Back neck

sections.paragraph:
Original: ערף

Transliteration: ‛ôreph

Phonetic: o-ref'

BDB Definition:

  1. neck, back of the neck, back
    1. back of the neck
      1. of fleeing foe
      2. of apostasy (figuratively)
    2. stiff of neck, obstinate (figuratively)

Origin: from H6202

TWOT entry: 1700a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
